VERIDEX validation All cases
§ 00

Overview

What this artifact is, and how to read it.

Purpose

This page is the browser-native form of a Power In Numbers case file. The same engines that render PDFs render here, only the cartography is visible. Visitors see, in seconds, the difference between a static deck and a live deliverable.

What is embedded

One Market Entry Intelligence Decision Protocol full report (an individual evaluating cross-border market entry) and four Sovereign Intelligence Decision Protocol briefings (a fiscal authority analysing itself). Each is the published deliverable, embedded inline.

How to read it

Use the left sidebar as a map. Each section is self-contained. The embedded interactives carry their own internal navigation — you can drill into any briefing without losing the wrapping cartography.

Validation

All five deliverables clear the firm’s 22 canonical VERIDEX gates plus the relevant engine extensions. The integrity score is shown inside each embedded briefing.

Engine A Market Entry Protocol — individual evaluating opportunity § 03
Engine B Sovereign Protocol — fiscal authority self-analysis § 04 — § 07
Principal · A Dr. Janelle Thompson · Epiphany Wellness · Nexten Summit Accra 2026 § 03
Principal · B Ministry of Finance audience · oversight bodies · 2026 fiscal envelope § 04 — § 07
Validation 22 canonical VERIDEX gates · engine extensions G·24 — G·27 /methodology/validation/
§ 01

Question Framing

How a Power In Numbers case opens, every time. Four anchors define the work before any number is rendered.

  1. 01

    Development question

    Can a U.S.-licensed clinician-educator enter a Ghanaian capability market in a form that is regulator-defensible, counterparty-defensible and cash-flow-defensible at the same time?

  2. 02

    Methodology applied

    Market Entry Protocol — Stage 3. Sixteen analytical outputs against the firm’s 22 VERIDEX gates plus engine-specific extensions. Two costed pathways scored on a 25-point opportunity / 25-point friction grid.

  3. 03

    Output

    A full report and a separate Decision-Maker Briefing. Two recommended pathways: a Direct Translation (clinic) at 18/25 opportunity and 14/25 friction; a Skills Transfer (academy) at 21/25 opportunity and 10/25 friction. Pathway B is recommended.

  4. 04

    Counterfactual considered

    Defer entry; defer 12 months and re-test against the regulatory envelope. The opportunity-cost test (Gate 10) requires explicit dollarisation of the no-entry path; that figure is rendered inside the Market Entry Protocol full report below.

§ 02

Throughline

The same principal. Fifteen years apart.

  1. 2011 · February

    Go Local Magazine, Volume I, Edition 1

    Dr. Janelle Thompson is profiled as the CEO of Epiphany Wellness in the inaugural edition of Power In Numbers’ Go Local Magazine. The relationship begins in the firm’s primary-source archive.

    Go Local Magazine — track-record entry

  2. 2011 — 2025

    Continuous operating record

    Doctorate-level anesthesia practice; ITEC-certified reflexology, Reiki, clinical aromatherapy; certification-pathway architecture. Operating record, not credential list, is what the engine consumes at Stage 1.

  3. 2026 · March

    Market Entry Protocol Stage-3 Full Report

    Re-engagement for an audit-grade analysis of cross-border market entry into Ghana. Prepared for Nexten Summit Accra 2026. Embedded in § 03 below.

§ 03 · Engine A

Market Entry Protocol — Full Report

Dr. Janelle Thompson · Epiphany Wellness · Nexten Summit Accra 2026. Sixteen analytical outputs. Two costed pathways. Separate Decision-Maker Briefing.

  • Pathway A · Direct Translation 18 / 25 opportunity · 14 / 25 friction
  • Pathway B · Skills Transfer 21 / 25 opportunity · 10 / 25 friction
  • Recommendation Pathway B · audit-defensible
  • Validation 22 / 22 VERIDEX · G·24 — G·27
§ 04 · Engine B · briefing 1 of 4

Sovereign Protocol — Domestic Resource Mobilisation

Allocation analysis of Ghana’s domestic resource mobilisation envelope. Four allocation options costed; counterfactuals costed alongside.

Engine B · Sovereign Protocol Ghana DRM Investment Allocation 2026 — 28 Open in new tab ↗
§ 05 · Engine B · briefing 2 of 4

Sovereign Protocol — Health Financing

Allocation cartography for the health-financing line item. The principal is a Ministry of Finance audience; the analysis is the sovereign analysing itself.

Engine B · Sovereign Protocol Ghana Health Financing Allocation Open in new tab ↗
§ 06 · Engine B · briefing 3 of 4

Sovereign Protocol — Ghana Stabilisation Fund

Sovereign-fund analysis structured for an oversight body. Counterfactual deployments costed inline.

Engine B · Sovereign Protocol Ghana Stabilisation Fund Open in new tab ↗
§ 07 · Engine B · briefing 4 of 4

Sovereign Protocol — Annual Budget Funding Amount

Annual Budget Funding Amount allocation analysis with explicit counterfactual deployments.

Engine B · Sovereign Protocol ABFA Allocation Open in new tab ↗
§ 08

Decision-Maker Briefing — separation of concerns

VERIDEX Gate 22 mandates that a Decision-Maker Briefing live separately from the analysis. What follows is the canonical shape of that artefact, in summary form. Each embedded deliverable above contains its own.

The question

Can the principal cross the border, or should they defer twelve months? If they cross, in what shape?

The recommendation

Pathway B — Skills Transfer / Academy. 21 / 25 opportunity. 10 / 25 friction. Audit-defensible against GIPC and CTVET regulatory architecture. Contingent on a named local partner.

The counterfactual

Defer twelve months. Re-test against regulatory envelope after the next Bank of Ghana monetary policy cycle. Opportunity cost dollarised inside the Market Entry Protocol full report.

The constraints

GIPC minimum-capital thresholds; CTVET certification scope; cedi-denominated revenue exposure; Bank of Ghana repatriation corridors.

The integrity stack

22 canonical VERIDEX gates · G·24 rate-currency · G·25 source-quality / temporal-provenance · G·26 addressable-market decomposition · G·27 Executive Summary construction. Full audit trail inside the embedded full report (§ 03).

§ Layer 05

VERIDEX

The validation standard the deliverables above passed.
